allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Clean command infrastructure - remove all boilerplate from commands

Moved ALL infrastructure (isUndoRedoOperation, objectWillChange, rebuildLookupCache) 
from individual commands into CommandManager where it belongs.

Changes:
- CommandManager now handles isUndoRedoOperation flag for execute/undo/redo
- CommandManager calls rebuildLookupCache after every command execution
- CommandManager sends objectWillChange notifications
- All 12 command classes cleaned - ZERO infrastructure code in commands
- Commands now ONLY modify data structures (document.unifiedObjects[index], etc.)
- Deleted ComplexObjectCommand - was creating full array copies (O(n) problem)
- Deleted executeComplexOperation helper - same O(n) issue
- Restored ObjectGrouping to use saveToUndoStack (will migrate with proper O(1) commands later)

Commands are now PURE - they only access minimal data, NO deep copies, NO infrastructure.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
